positive: A stylized, symmetrical circular emblem featuring celestial elements combined with flowing botanical motifs. The main subject is a constellation of glowing, stylized mushrooms and lunar flora, interspersed with abstract geometric constellations forming a wreath around a central, detailed nebula portrait. Style: Intricate linework combined with bold, saturated gouache color blocking, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Surrealism. Composition: Highly centered, perfect for a t-shirt print, with clean silhouettes and a strong contrast between deep midnight indigo backgrounds and luminous gold, teal, and emerald accents. Lighting: Minimal, controlled luminescence only emanating from the stylized flora and nebulae. Print-friendly, solid color areas, highly detailed yet readable.
negative: text, watermark, logo, brand, blurry, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, grain, noise, grayscale, realistic photo, photographic, clutter, messy lines, copyrighted characters
